title: Barra de Navidad Lagoon
description: A tranquil coastal inlet perfect for kayaking, birdwatching, and boat tours. Surrounded by mangroves and calm waters, it’s a peaceful escape that showcases the region’s biodiversity and natural beauty.

title: La Audiencia Viewpoint
description: This elevated lookout offers panoramic views of Manzanillo Bay, with dramatic cliffs, turquoise waters, and passing ships. It’s an ideal spot for photography, sunset watching, or simply soaking in the coastal atmosphere.Boca de Túnel is an adventure park nestled among rocky canyons and a crystal-clear reservoir. It’s one of central Mexico’s best-kept secrets a place where wild nature, adrenaline, and breathtaking views come together in perfect harmony.

title: Club de Golf Las Hadas
description: A world-class golf course nestled between palm trees and ocean breezes. With lush fairways and challenging greens, it’s a favorite among visitors seeking sport, scenery, and sophistication.
